title: Knysna Council stays in place
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Council will not be...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News\n Update","html":"Breaking News\n Update"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Council will not be dissolved, and the present council will stay in place.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Council will not be dissolved, and the present council will stay in place."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This emerged from a report submitted by the Select Committee of the National Council of Provinces, chaired by Thomas Mxolisi Kaunda."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The National Council of Provinces voted to reject the move by Anton Bredell, Western Cape MEC for Local Government, to dissolve the Council and place the municipality under administration in terms of Sections 139 (c) of the Constitution.","html":"The National Council of Provinces voted to reject the move by Anton Bredell, Western Cape MEC for Local Government, to dissolve the Council and place the municipality under administration in terms of Sections 139 (c) of the Constitution."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Seven provinces voted to support of the Select Committee’s report, two voted against.","html":"Seven provinces voted to support of the Select Committee’s report, two voted against."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Photos: Rozano Alie","html":"Photos: Rozano Alie"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Video (Newsed, Youtube):"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous articles","html":"Read previous articles"},{"type":"list","items":["National crisis in local government","Bredell faces political barrage","Majority opposes Knysna Council dissolution","Knysna Council placed under administration","Knysna council to challenge dissolution"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
